name: Bodies
description: Adds equippable body/armor outfit items and character body model support.
shortDescription: Equippable body and armor items with model support for character outfits.
longDescription: Adds a wearable body and armor item system that can change a character model or apply outfit-specific body support from inventory items. The plugin includes item definitions, custom entities, networking, and interface hooks so armor pieces can behave like real equipment instead of static cosmetic props.

name: Bounties
description: Adds bounty posting/tracking gameplay for roleplay servers.
shortDescription: Player bounty posting and tracking tools for roleplay-driven contracts.
longDescription: Adds a bounty workflow for creating, tracking, and resolving player contracts. The code includes custom UI, network messages, persistent data, commands, and entity support so bounty boards or related interfaces can turn wanted-player gameplay into a structured server feature.

name: Frontier Networks Char Select
description: Adds frontier networks char select functionality for the gamemode.
shortDescription: A polished character selection screen for browsing and loading characters.
longDescription: Replaces the default character selection flow with a branded interface for viewing, selecting, and loading characters. The plugin is focused on presentation and usability, giving players a cleaner entry point before they enter the server.

name: Widgets
description: Adds a widget/context menu system, including GPS-style widgets.
shortDescription: A widget and context-menu system with GPS-style utility panels.
longDescription: Adds a player-facing widget/context menu layer that can expose utility panels such as GPS-style tools. It is built as an interface extension, making server features easier to surface without forcing players through chat commands or scattered menus.

name: DarkRP compatibility
description: Adds DarkRP compatibility.
shortDescription: A compatibility bridge for DarkRP-style behavior inside a roleplay framework.
longDescription: Provides compatibility glue for DarkRP-style systems so legacy behaviors, entities, or assumptions can work inside the roleplay framework. The code hooks into characters, NPC/entity behavior, and framework events to smooth over integration points that would otherwise require manual edits.

name: Horses
description: Rideable horses with saddlebag storage.
shortDescription: Rideable horses with saddlebag storage for frontier-style travel.
longDescription: Adds rideable horse entities with storage-oriented saddlebag support. The plugin provides custom entity behavior so horses can function as both transportation and a lightweight inventory companion for long-form roleplay.

name: Lanterns
description: Lanterns with persistent oil storage, burning over time, and refillable with oil bottles.
shortDescription: Persistent lantern items with oil usage, burn time, and refill support.
longDescription: Adds lantern items that track oil over time, burn down while active, and can be refilled with oil bottles. It integrates with inventory and character data so lanterns behave like persistent tools rather than disposable props.

name: Frontier Networks Main Interface
description: Adds a custom loading/main menu interface for Frontier Networks.
shortDescription: A branded loading and main-menu interface for a polished first impression.
longDescription: Reworks the loading and main-menu presentation with custom UI and framework hooks. It is designed to make the first player interaction feel intentional, with branded screens and a smoother transition into character selection or gameplay.

name: RDR2 Styled Map
description: Adds mini map compatibility.
shortDescription: A western-styled map and minimap layer for in-world navigation.
longDescription: Adds map/minimap compatibility with a Red Dead-inspired presentation. The plugin focuses on navigation and visual polish, giving players a more thematic way to orient themselves while keeping the interface tied to roleplay immersion.

name: Helix NPC
description: Adds configurable interactable NPC entities and NPC dialogue/action support.
shortDescription: Configurable interactable NPC entities with dialogue and action support.
longDescription: Adds configurable NPC entities that can drive dialogue, actions, or server interactions. The code includes custom entities, client/server networking, persistent data, and UI support so staff can build reusable NPC-driven interaction points.

name: Permakill
description: Adds staff-controlled permakill/permanent death workflow support.
shortDescription: Staff-controlled permanent death workflows with configurable support tools.
longDescription: Adds tools for managing permanent-death workflows, including commands, configurable settings, networking, and interface support. It gives staff a structured way to handle high-impact character consequences instead of relying on manual tracking.

name: Prison System
description: Arrest, sentencing and custody.
shortDescription: Arrest, sentencing, custody, and release workflows for law roleplay.
longDescription: Adds a full custody workflow around arrests, jailing, sentencing, and releases. The plugin includes custom UI, network messages, persistent data, commands, and entities so police and staff can manage imprisonment as an actual system.

name: Tobacco System
description: Adds a tobacco growing system.
shortDescription: A tobacco growing and production loop with entities and item support.
longDescription: Adds tobacco production gameplay with custom entities, item definitions, configurable values, and client-facing support. It gives players a resource loop built around planting, processing, or handling tobacco as an economy item.

name: Inventory PAC Items
description: Adds support for PAC data on items based on inventory presence, in addition to equip status.
shortDescription: PAC outfit data applied from inventory presence and equipment state.
longDescription: Extends inventory items so PAC data can be applied based on whether items are owned, present, or equipped. This lets wearable visuals and item-driven appearance changes follow the character inventory more reliably.

name: VR Item Pickup
description: Lets VR players add a grabbed Helix item to their inventory by pressing the pickup trigger.
shortDescription: VRMod item pickup support for grabbing items into inventory.
longDescription: Lets VR players pick up compatible inventory items using controller input. The plugin bridges VRMod interaction with inventory behavior, allowing grabbed Helix items to be added through a natural VR pickup action.

name: Helix VR Integration
description: Seamlessly enables Helix menus and HUDs for VRMod players using VR controller keys and actions.
shortDescription: VR controller support for menus, HUDs, and inventory interactions.
longDescription: Adds VRMod compatibility for framework menus, HUD behavior, controller keys, and player actions. It includes commands, interface integration, and character/inventory support so VR players can interact with core server systems without breaking immersion.

name: Custom Circular HUD
description: A circular health HUD with semicircular stamina (left) and hunger (right) bars and conditional icons for hunger/thirst.
shortDescription: A circular player HUD with health, stamina, hunger, and thirst indicators.
longDescription: Adds a custom circular HUD with a central health display, semicircular stamina and hunger bars, and conditional status icons for needs such as hunger and thirst. The UI is built to keep core status readable while preserving screen space.

name: Book-Based F1 Menu Replacement
description: Replaces the existing F1 menu with a book-based menu (Based on Cyanide.
shortDescription: A book-inspired F1 menu for rules, help, and server information.
longDescription: Replaces the standard F1 menu with a stylized book interface. It provides a more thematic home for rules, help pages, and player-facing server information, with UI and command hooks for opening the experience cleanly.

name: Guilds
description: Adds a custom player-facing interface/menu layer.
shortDescription: Player-created guilds with membership, roles, and management menus.
longDescription: Adds a guild/group system where players can create organizations, manage members, assign roles, and interact through a dedicated interface. The plugin includes networking, persistence, configuration, commands, and custom UI for a complete group-management feature.

name: SW: Galaxies Main Interface
description: Adds a custom loading/main menu interface for the schema.
shortDescription: A cinematic loading and main-menu presentation for server entry.
longDescription: Adds a custom loading and main-menu layer designed to improve the first impression before players enter the world. The feature focuses on presentation, branding, and smoother navigation into the play session.

name: UI (Menu Principal)
description: Adds a custom character select/load UI for Helix schemas.
shortDescription: A custom character selection and loading flow with styled panels.
longDescription: Reworks character selection and loading into a more polished interface. It gives players a clearer path from menu to character while supporting themed transitions and server-specific presentation.

name: Hud Elements
description: Adds a replacement weapon-selection HUD.
shortDescription: A cleaner replacement weapon-selection HUD.
longDescription: Replaces the default weapon selector with a custom HUD element. It improves readability and presentation when swapping weapons, making the selection process feel more aligned with a polished roleplay UI.

name: Prodigy UI
description: Adds a full custom Helix UI layer including menus, inventory, scoreboard, settings, storage, business, and notices.
shortDescription: A full interface suite for inventory, menus, scoreboard, storage, and notices.
longDescription: Adds a broad custom UI layer covering major player interactions such as inventory, scoreboard, storage, business menus, settings, notices, and other daily-use panels. The plugin includes extensive client UI, networking, configuration, persistence, and commands, making it closer to a full interface framework than a single menu.

name: Alcohol Production (Niums)
description: Adds the ability to brew alcohol in helix.
shortDescription: A brewing production loop with ingredients, entities, and timed processing.
longDescription: Adds alcohol brewing gameplay through production entities and ingredient/item handling. Players can use the system as an economy loop, turning materials and time into finished products suitable for roleplay trade or consumption systems.

name: Role-Based Character Limits
description: Overrides default character slot limits based on user group.
shortDescription: Character slot limits that change by user group or role.
longDescription: Overrides default character slot limits based on player group or role configuration. It gives server owners flexible control over how many characters different ranks can create without hardcoding limits in core framework files.

name: Jail System
description: Arrest, sentencing and custody.
shortDescription: Custody, jail, and release tools for structured law enforcement roleplay.
longDescription: Adds a jailing workflow with UI, commands, networked behavior, persistence, and supporting entities. It is built to formalize arrest and custody gameplay so punishments, jail times, and releases can be handled consistently.

name: Lockpicking
description: Allows to pick locks with bobby pins.
shortDescription: Bobby-pin lockpicking with interaction timing and item support.
longDescription: Adds lockpicking gameplay built around bobby pins and interactive access attempts. The plugin includes custom UI, item definitions, entity hooks, and character integration so locked interactions can become a skill-based roleplay mechanic.

name: Clothing
description: Clothing.
shortDescription: Wearable clothing and outfit customization support.
longDescription: Adds clothing items and outfit behavior that can be applied to characters through inventory-style interactions. It includes client/server UI, item definitions, hooks, and character integration for persistent wardrobe customization.

name: Application System
description: Adds an immersive and realistic IC application system.
shortDescription: In-character applications for controlled jobs, factions, or access requests.
longDescription: Adds an in-character application system for handling requests such as jobs, faction entry, or permissions. It includes custom UI, commands, item/entity support, and framework hooks so applications can become part of the roleplay workflow.

name: Char Creation
description: Adds custom character creation flow changes.
shortDescription: A customized character creation flow with tailored screens and rules.
longDescription: Reworks character creation with custom interface behavior, networking, configuration, item hooks, and framework integration. It is useful when the default creation process needs to match a specific server style or enforce custom character setup rules.

name: Commander Faction Menu
description: Adds a commander/faction-management menu.
shortDescription: Leadership-facing faction management tools.
longDescription: Adds a commander or leadership menu for managing faction-related tasks. The plugin includes custom UI, commands, networking, character data, and admin-style checks to help faction leaders or staff manage membership and organization workflows.

name: Detective
description: Adds detective roleplay tools and systems.
shortDescription: Investigation tools and evidence-focused roleplay systems.
longDescription: Adds detective-oriented systems for investigation roleplay, with custom UI, networked interactions, entities, item definitions, and framework hooks. It gives investigative characters more structured tools than simple chat-based roleplay.

name: Group Manager
description: Allow players to create their own in-game groups with custom name and roles.
shortDescription: Player-created groups with names, roles, and membership controls.
longDescription: Lets players create and manage in-game groups with custom names, roles, membership controls, and leadership tools. The system supports player-facing administration and persistent organization gameplay, making it useful for crews, businesses, gangs, or other player-led groups.

name: HotWire
description: Adds the ability to use a hot wire to start up the engine.
shortDescription: Vehicle hotwiring using a hotwire item and engine-start attempts.
longDescription: Adds vehicle hotwiring gameplay so players can attempt to start engines without normal access. The plugin uses UI, networking, item definitions, framework hooks, and character checks to turn vehicle theft or emergency access into an interactive mechanic.

name: Inventory Slots
description: Adds equipment/inventory slot support.
shortDescription: Additional equipment slots for wearable or functional inventory items.
longDescription: Adds extra inventory/equipment slot behavior for items that need to be equipped, worn, or tracked separately from normal storage. It includes UI and networking support, item definitions, custom entities, and framework hooks.

name: ArcCW Support + Magazine System
description: Adds arccw support + magazine system functionality for the gamemode.
shortDescription: ArcCW weapon and magazine integration for inventory-driven gunplay.
longDescription: Adds ArcCW support with magazine-oriented inventory behavior. It connects weapon handling to item definitions, character data, and framework hooks so ammunition and magazines can be managed more realistically.

name: Clothing System
description: Adds modern clothing store UI.
shortDescription: A modern clothing-store UI for buying and applying outfits.
longDescription: Adds a full clothing store and outfit management workflow with custom UI, networking, persistence, entities, and item definitions. Players can browse and apply clothing through a polished interface rather than relying on manual model changes.

name: Cocaine System
description: Adds cocaine system.
shortDescription: A cocaine production and sale loop with interactable processing.
longDescription: Adds cocaine production gameplay through staged entities, item definitions, configuration, and interface support. It is built as an economy loop where players interact with processing steps and outputs instead of receiving a single static item.

name: MafiaRP Crafting
description: Adds a better crafting solution to helix.
shortDescription: Recipe-based crafting with components, outputs, and item production.
longDescription: Adds a crafting system centered on recipes, required components, and produced items. The plugin includes custom UI, networking, custom entities, item definitions, and framework hooks so crafting can be presented as a structured player workflow.

name: Faction Management
description: Adds faction management functionality for the gamemode.
shortDescription: Faction administration tools for ranks, members, and leadership workflows.
longDescription: Adds faction management features for staff or authorized leaders, including UI, networking, commands, persistent data, and entity support. It helps manage membership, ranks, and faction organization from inside the game.

name: Meth System
description: Adds meth system.
shortDescription: A meth production loop with staged processing and interactive entities.
longDescription: Adds meth production gameplay with custom entities, item definitions, configuration, networking, and interface support. It creates a multi-step economy activity where players interact with production equipment and outputs.

name: Zrush Entity Persistence
description: Saves zrush oil production entities and restores them across restarts.
shortDescription: Persistence for oil production entities across restarts.
longDescription: Saves and restores oil production entities so production setups survive server restarts. It hooks into entity and persistence behavior to keep economy infrastructure from disappearing unexpectedly.

name: Police Armory
description: Provides a role-based armory with rank/flag restrictions.
shortDescription: A role-restricted armory with rank and flag checks.
longDescription: Adds an armory system that controls equipment access by role, rank, or flag restrictions. It includes custom UI, entity support, character checks, and admin-aware behavior for controlled law-enforcement loadouts.

name: Police CAD/Interaction
description: Adds police cad/interaction functionality for the gamemode.
shortDescription: Police CAD and interaction tools for law-enforcement workflows.
longDescription: Adds a larger police interaction suite, including CAD-style UI, networking, commands, persistence, custom entities, and framework hooks. It supports law-enforcement roleplay with structured player lookups, interactions, records, or related police workflows.

name: Properties System
description: Adds properties system functionality for the gamemode.
shortDescription: Property ownership and management for roleplay locations.
longDescription: Adds property ownership and management tools backed by custom UI, networking, configuration, persistence, and entity support. It lets locations behave like ownable or manageable assets instead of static map spaces.

name: Telecommunications
description: Adds phones, pagers, payphones and more.
shortDescription: Phones, pagers, payphones, and communication item support.
longDescription: Adds telecommunications items and utilities such as phones, pagers, payphones, or radio-style communication tools. The plugin expands roleplay communication beyond ordinary chat by providing item-backed communication features.

name: LifeRP HUD
description: Adds a custom LifeRP-style HUD.
shortDescription: A custom status HUD for core player feedback.
longDescription: Adds a custom LifeRP-style HUD for player status and screen feedback. The code includes client UI, commands, entity hooks, character data, and inventory integration to present important information in a more polished way.

name: PK Plugin
description: pretty self explanatory.
shortDescription: A helper for tracking and enforcing active permakill states.
longDescription: Adds a lightweight permakill status workflow with commands, character data, and admin controls. It helps staff track when characters are under PK-related conditions without relying entirely on external notes.

name: User Interface
description: Adds a custom player-facing interface/menu layer.
shortDescription: A player-facing UI layer for polished menus and interactions.
longDescription: Adds a custom player-facing interface layer with client UI and networked behavior. It is designed to improve common menu and interaction surfaces so players encounter a more cohesive interface experience.

name: Realistic Bank
description: Adds realistic bank functionality for the gamemode.
shortDescription: Bank accounts, transactions, and finance UI for roleplay economies.
longDescription: Adds a banking system with custom UI, networking, configuration, persistent data, and custom entities. It supports account-style finance interactions and player-facing money management for economy-driven roleplay.

name: Auto Staff Character
description: Automatically creates and equips a staff character for admin ranks using SAM.
shortDescription: Automatic staff character creation and equipment for admin ranks.
longDescription: Automatically creates and equips staff characters for eligible admin ranks, using rank checks and character hooks. It reduces staff setup time and keeps administrative characters consistent across sessions.

name: Casino Ownership System
description: Adds casino ownership areas and house profit routing.
shortDescription: Casino ownership areas with house-profit routing.
longDescription: Adds ownership logic for multiple casino areas, allowing characters to be assigned as owners and receive house profits through banking routes. It includes UI, networking, commands, persistence, and framework hooks for managing ownership and payouts.

name: Discord Warrant RCON
description: Lets Discord/RCON integrations mark players wanted after approval.
shortDescription: RCON-assisted warrants for externally approved wanted statuses.
longDescription: Lets approved external integrations mark players wanted through server console/RCON commands. It includes command handling, character data, and admin-style safeguards so Discord or approval workflows can feed into in-game law systems.

name: Smugglers
description: Adds NPC smugglers that can sell things. Heavily based on Chessnut.
shortDescription: NPC smugglers that sell configured goods through in-world vendors.
longDescription: Adds configurable NPC smugglers with UI, networking, commands, persistence, and settings. The system gives staff a way to create illicit or special vendors that players interact with directly in the world.

name: Offline Character Remove/Blocks/Unblocks
description: Allows staff to remove/block/unblock characters which are or not actively loaded on the server.
shortDescription: Staff tools for removing, blocking, and unblocking offline characters.
longDescription: Adds staff-facing tools for removing, blocking, and unblocking characters even when those characters are not actively loaded. It includes UI, networking, commands, framework hooks, and character data support for safer offline administration.

name: KOTOR Style IX Menu
description: Reworks the tab menu to be more user friendly.
shortDescription: A KOTOR-inspired tab menu with broader player information panels.
longDescription: Reworks the tab menu into a more user-friendly KOTOR-inspired interface. The plugin includes custom UI, networking, commands, configuration, and entity support to present player information and menu actions more cleanly.

name: Marketplace
description: Adds a marketplace entity and resource trading flow.
shortDescription: A trade-network marketplace for listing, buying, and selling resources or items.
longDescription: Provides a marketplace built around a dedicated marketplace entity, configurable item blacklists, listing limits, and resource trading. It includes client/server networking, timers, fonts, and resource handling so players can browse and trade through an in-world economy interface.

name: Faction Capture
description: Adds capturable territory/control point gameplay.
shortDescription: Territory capture points with contested progress, ownership, and HUD updates.
longDescription: Adds capturable territory points with named locations, persistent point data, capture progress, contested-state handling, and nearby HUD networking. The system counts eligible faction players in the capture radius, announces capture attempts, updates ownership, and supports faction reward logic.

name: Faction Raid System
description: Faction vs Faction PVP raid system with KDR tracking.
shortDescription: Faction raid orchestration with commands, cooldowns, assists, and KDR tracking.
longDescription: Adds faction-versus-faction raid management with high-command raid initiation, assist commands, raid hiding, status checks, global active-raid state, per-faction cooldowns, and persistent raid statistics. It tracks attacker/defender kills, deaths, assisting players, wins, losses, and client HUD updates.
